title: UnPETAfied
description: Adds drops to most mobs that don't drop anything
body:
Mojang keeps adding mobs that have no drops, so I fixed that!

This datapack adds drops for the following mobs:
- Camel
- Frog 
- Ocelot
- Sniffer
- Goat
- Axolotl
- Bat

Check the galley to see what each of these mobs drop.
